mapper.select:
SELECT t.TEXTBOOK_SN, t.TEXTBOOK_NM, t.PUBR_NM, t.AUTHR_NM, t.TAGLINE, t.BOOK_SMRY, t.TOC_CN, t.INSTR_USER_ID, t.ISBN_NO, t.TRGT_GRD_CN, t.SUBJ_CD, t.SALE_PRC_AMT, t.PURCH_PRC_AMT, t.DLVR_AMT, t.THMB_IMG, t.USE_YN, t.RGTR_ID, t.LAST_MDFR_ID, t.REG_DT, t.MDFCN_DT, NULL AS SUBJ_NM, t.SUBJ_CL_ID AS SUBJ_CL_ID, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS SUBJ_CL_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON t.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON t.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID
ORDER BY t.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON t.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID

SELECT t.TEXTBOOK_SN, t.TEXTBOOK_NM, t.PUBR_NM, t.AUTHR_NM, t.TAGLINE, t.BOOK_SMRY, t.TOC_CN, t.INSTR_USER_ID, t.ISBN_NO, t.TRGT_GRD_CN, t.SUBJ_CD, t.SALE_PRC_AMT, t.PURCH_PRC_AMT, t.DLVR_AMT, t.THMB_IMG, t.USE_YN, t.RGTR_ID, t.LAST_MDFR_ID, t.REG_DT, t.MDFCN_DT, NULL AS SUBJ_NM, t.SUBJ_CL_ID AS SUBJ_CL_ID, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS SUBJ_CL_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON t.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON t.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE t.TEXTBOOK_SN = #{textbookSn} AND t.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_433531".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TEXTBOOK ( TEXTBOOK_NM, PUBR_NM, AUTHR_NM, ISBN_NO, TRGT_GRD_CN, SUBJ_CD, SUBJ_CL_ID, TAGLINE, BOOK_SMRY, TOC_CN, INSTR_USER_ID, SALE_PRC_AMT, PURCH_PRC_AMT, DLVR_AMT, THMB_IMG, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{textbookNm}, #{pubrNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authrNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isbnNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trgtGrdCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{subjClId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{tagline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bookSmry, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tocCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instrUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salePrcAmt}, #{purchPrcAmt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dlvrAmt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{thmbImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{useYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TRUNC(REG_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t JOIN TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY i ON t.TEXTBOOK_SN = i.TEXTBOOK_SN WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' AND i.SALABLE_CNT <= i.MIN_KEEP_CNT AND i.SALABLE_CNT > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t JOIN TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY i ON t.TEXTBOOK_SN = i.TEXTBOOK_SN WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' AND i.SALABLE_CNT = 0
